CheckTitle: RDS Cluster critical events are subscribed.をチェックします
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks, AWS Security Best Practices
Description: Amazon RDS event notification subscriptionsが有効です for データベース cluster events, particularly maintenance and failure.を確認します
Risk: イベントサブスクリプションs for critical events, such as maintenance and failures, you may not be aware of issues affecting your RDS クラスターs, leading to downtime or セキュリティ脆弱性.がない場合、

Recommendation.Text: To subscribe to RDS クラスター event notifications, see Subscribing to Amazon RDS event notification in the Amazon RDS User Guide.
